title: Fan Owners: The Next Music Business Model
excerpt: The biggest fans already create value. FanFactors gives them a platform role where taste, trust, selling and support can become a measurable music business.
seoTitle: Fan Owners: The Next Music Business Model — FanFactors Blog
seoDescription: The biggest fans already create value. FanFactors gives them a platform role where taste, trust, selling and support can become a measurable music business.

title: Why Direct-Pay Music Matters
excerpt: Music platforms should not hide value from the people who own the songs. FanFactors makes legal listening and owner-directed payments part of the product story from day one.
seoTitle: Why Direct-Pay Music Matters — FanFactors Blog
seoDescription: Music platforms should not hide value from the people who own the songs. FanFactors makes legal listening and owner-directed payments part of the product story from day one.

title: The Billion Millionaires Mission
excerpt: FanFactors is built around the belief that music culture can create more owners, more sellers, more artist upside and more economic participation at global scale.
seoTitle: The Billion Millionaires Mission — FanFactors Blog
seoDescription: FanFactors is built around the belief that music culture can create more owners, more sellers, more artist upside and more economic participation at global scale.
